title: calyptrocalyx lepidotus
intro: Calyptrocalyx lepidotus, also known as the 'lepidote cycad', is a type of cycad plant that belongs to the family Arecaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calyptrocalyx lepidotus are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
